title: 410 Gone handler deletes followers across all personas
description:
In delivery.rs process_batch(), when a delivery gets a 410 Gone response, the cleanup query is:

  DELETE FROM followers WHERE inbox_uri = ? OR shared_inbox_uri = ?

There is no persona_id filter. If two personas each have a follower using the same shared inbox (e.g., sharedInbox on a large Mastodon instance), a 410 response to a post from persona A will delete all followers of persona B from that instance as well.

Fix: restrict the DELETE to the followers belonging to the persona whose post was being delivered. The delivery_queue row should be joined through posts to personas to get the persona_id, and the DELETE should add AND persona_id = <that persona_id>.
close_reason: All pass 2 fixes applied: circuit breaker reset, persona-scoped 410, SSRF private IP block, tokio::fs, URL scheme validation, Content-Type, page clamp, watch dedup
